session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. This is READ-ONLY - report what happened but do not modify any files yourself.

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here's a summary of the results:
## Summary
**Status: FAILED**
### Passing Checks: - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Format Check (ruff format): 1721 files already formatted - Prettier Check: All matched files use Prettier code style - Type Checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 6025 passed in 27.11s - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 6.24s - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.91s - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): 28 passed
### Failing Check: - **Exec Reference Check**: FAILED - Error: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date` - Fix command: `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate it
The fast-ci pipeline completed most checks successfully, but one documentation reference file needs to be regenerated. The failing file is at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`.
